summary: Backend Case Management API Testing Complete. All 27 pytest tests PASSED. Full case lifecycle (alert → case → session → safety plan → referral → handoff) verified end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: SafetyPlan id validation fix is correctly implemented in case_router.py line 539-556 - only passes id when existing_plan exists
seed_data_creation: Used existing safeguarding alerts and cases from database for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Case Management API is fully functional. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_case_management.py covers: Morning Queue, Case CRUD, Sessions, Safety Plans, Referrals, Handoff Summary, Access Control, and Options endpoints. All 27 tests passed.

morning_queue_api.details: Returns high_priority and standard alerts categorized by risk level

case_crud_api.details: All CRUD operations working, proper auth validation, status filtering

triage_sessions_api.details: Sessions can be added, session cap (3) warning works, all session fields accepted

safety_plan_api.details: Create and update safety plans working, id validation bug FIXED

referral_api.details: Referrals can be created with all service types

handoff_summary_api.details: Generates comprehensive PDF-ready summary with all sections

options_endpoints.details: All options endpoints return correct data structures

e2e_lifecycle_test_results.flow_tested: alert → case → session → safety plan → referral → handoff summary
